name: Chorizo Breakfast Hash
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Cacique Brand Chorizo (beef or pork)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the diced potatoes and cook for about 8 minutes, or until tender. Drain and cool.
2. Cook the chorizo in a skillet over medium heat until browned and rendered fat is visible. Remove from heat and let it drain off excess fat.
3. In the same skillet, add the cooled potatoes, diced green bell peppers, and diced Roma tomatoes. Sauté for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve with scrambled eggs.
